title: Claude Code Skill frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter at the top of every SKILL.md under sdlc/files/_common/skills/ or sdlc/files/stacks/<name>/skills/. The body of SKILL.md (everything after the frontmatter) is free-form Markdown — Claude reads it as the skill's instructions and isn't validated here.

name.description: Lowercase identifier — matches the parent directory under skills/ and is how Claude refers to the skill when invoking it. 2–64 chars, lowercase, kebab-cased.

description.description: What the skill does AND when Claude should invoke it. Both halves matter — without 'when to use' triggers, discovery doesn't fire. Aim for 100–500 characters.

version.description: Optional semver. Useful when a skill's expected behaviour changes incompatibly; consumers can pin to a known version.

tags.description: Optional tags for grouping skills (e.g. 'testing', 'security', 'compliance'). Not consumed by Claude — useful for documentation tooling.
